ab: minsa’ min matisal maman cami ci yaba’ hira’.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: ma’ilis ka papak ni mama’ la.
kumaṟal caminan ka hiya’, kelan tutux na baling ka ramu’uy ma.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: sunbale’ ramu’uy ci kaca ka hiya’ ga, minoh ramu’uy bawi’ mastuw la.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: siaras ci asinuw wanux lu binro ni yaba’ ka mama’.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: mapatisal min abelan ci mama’, payux ka ke’ kinaṟal ni.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: pagiy cu ci kaca ga, babawi’ su’ la, muṟaṟing su’ mabatunux uṟi la mi mama’ mu.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: kumaṟal cu maman mu; “bale’ ka papak su’ laga, awah matisal moṟow min babuw ni uṟi la sun mu.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
